purpose: Optional header illustration for each science card in the habit catalog (HabitScienceSheet). NEW batch. 1024x1024, transparent background, single centered emblem/mini-scene. Slugs match src/constants/habitCatalog.ts and habitCatalog.<slug> in i18n. Wire up by adding an optional image to HabitCatalogEntry + rendering it in the sheet header once generated.
shared_prompt_body: single centered chibi emblem / mini-scene, 3D Pixar-style, dark-fantasy jungle-kingdom vibe, teal and gold palette with soft glow, transparent background, premium mobile-game quality, wholesome and motivating, no text
